markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Product deep dive on hyperexponential's insurance technology platform, focusing on HX Renew, submission triage, and portfolio intelligence capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HX Renew is a best-in-class pricing and rating platform for complex insurance, used by actuaries and underwriters](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [New capabilities in development include submission triage (for pre-pricing workflow) and portfolio intelligence (for post-pricing analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Platform offers significant advantages over Excel-based workflows, particularly for complex risks and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Target customers range from large carriers to smaller MGAs, with varying needs for integrated vs. point solutions](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

## Topics

### HX Renew Overview

  - [Core pricing and rating platform for insurance carriers and MGAs](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Replaces Excel-based workflows with a more robust, integrated system](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Key features:](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
      - [API integrations with policy admin systems and third-party data sources](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
      - [Customizable workflow with Python-based backend for actuaries](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [Real-time pricing updates and validations](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [Auditability through comprehensive change history](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [Portfolio analysis capabilities at point of pricing](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

### Submission Triage and Ingestion

  - [Pre-pricing capability to manage high volumes of submissions](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [Uses AI to extract and map data from PDFs (e.g., ACORD forms) to pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Allows for automatic rejection, flagging for review, or acceptance of submissions](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [Particularly valuable for MGAs and smaller insurers seeking integrated solutions](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)

### Portfolio Intelligence

  - [Post-pricing analysis tool for viewing and steering business at a portfolio level](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
  - [Key capabilities:](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2451.0)
      - [Batch rating for rapid portfolio-wide updates (e.g., in response to new cyber threats)](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
      - [Granular metrics segmentation by various factors (LOB, geography, underwriter)](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
      - [Scenario and impact analysis for portfolio changes](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2535.0)
  - [Competes with dedicated BI tools, especially attractive for smaller insurers](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)

### Actuarial Development Environment

  - [Integrated Python-based environment for actuaries to build and maintain pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
  - [Features version control and collaborative tools](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=2944.0)
  - [Includes "Actuarial Agent" (beta) - an AI assistant to help build models using natural language prompts](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=3039.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to use information to update content artifacts for hyperexponential](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=3145.0)
  - [Potential follow-up deep dive with solutions engineers if more detailed product information is needed](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=3152.0)
  - [Gene available to assist with any questions about system integrations](https://fathom.video/share/6xycUVwRKoC4ZfiJw_hHpx71dxLZLshi?tab=summary&timestamp=3169.0)
